Question Text: Can users inspect citations before acting on AI-generated content?
Approved Answer: Yes. The platform can expose citations, confidence cues, and workflow checkpoints so a human reviewer can inspect supporting context before taking action.
Yes. Verified right-to-erasure requests are operationally targeted within 30 days, subject to retention obligations.

Question Text: Do you perform independent penetration testing?
Approved Answer: Yes. Independent penetration testing is performed at least annually and after material architectural change.

Question Text: Can the platform be deployed as single-tenant?
Approved Answer: Yes. A single-tenant virtual private cloud deployment is available for customers with stronger isolation requirements.
No. Customer-managed deployment is not the default delivery model and requires separate scoping through professional services.

Question Text: Can you offer unlimited AI usage on a fixed fee as standard?
Approved Answer: No. Unlimited AI usage is not part of the standard approved commercial position.
